stories: Good morning Sean, it's Sunday, the third of May, 2026
Here's something to start with that I find genuinely satisfying: no US President has ever died in the month of May
Every other month of the year has claimed at least one
Something to file away for the right pub quiz team
Your calendar is clear today — no calls, no meetings, no pre-reads
On the Singapore economy, fresh trade data makes for encouraging reading
3 percent in March, while re-exports surged a remarkable 61
4 percent, extending the gains from the previous quarter
